Jess Glass Photography is a professional wedding photographer based in New York City, New York. Specializing in capturing authentic, emotional moments, Jess Glass Photography brings a unique artistic vision to every wedding. With 96 glowing reviews and a passion for storytelling, every image reflects the love and joy of your special day.
